case_title: CITY CENTRE ASSOCIATES A DELAWARE GENERAL VS. GEORGIOU PROPERTIES INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF DEPOSITION SUBPOENA FOR PERSONAL APPEARANCE AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND THINGS; APPLICATION AND ORDER FOR APPEARANCE AND EXAMINATION-ENFORCEMENT OF JUDGMENT-JUDGMENT DEBTOR FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY CENTRE ASSOCIATES A DELAWARE GENERAL PARTNERSHIP SERVED JUN-20-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GEORGIOU PROPERTIES INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

STIPULATION RE CONTINUANCE OF APPEARANCE AND EXAMINATION OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR GEORGIOU PROPERTIES, INC. FILED BY CITY CENTRE ASSOCIATES A DELAWARE GENERAL PARTNERSHIP GEORGIOU PROPERTIES INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY CENTRE ASSOCIATES A DELAWARE GENERAL PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEORGIOU PROPERTIES INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $38,398.72 PRINCIPAL, $5,087.57 INTEREST, $335.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $43,821.29, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO GEORGIOU PROPERTIES INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, SPECIFICALLY GEORGE GEORGIOU ON JUL-12-2006 CONTINUED TO JUL-21-2006 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 612 PER STIPULATION OF PARTIES.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY CENTRE ASSOCIATES A DELAWARE GENERAL PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT GEORGIOU PROPERTIES INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION OEX HEARING SET FOR JUL-12-2006 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 612

ORDER OF EXAMINATION JUL-21-2006 DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT GEORGIOU PROPERTIES INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, BY SERVING GEROGE GEORGIOU. JUDGMENT DEBTOR SWORN AND EXAMINED ON JULY 21, 2006. ATTORNEY FOR CITY CENTRE WAS SUPPOSED TO CALL DISCOVERY AND GIVE A CONTINUANCE DATE, 2 WEEKS HAVE ELAPSED WITHOUT CORRESPONDENCE OR TELEPHONIC CALL FROM ATTORNEY.

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY CENTRE ASSOCIATES A DELAWARE GENERAL PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT GEORGIOU PROPERTIES INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
